faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Ridgewood, Queens?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in Ridgewood typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of ants. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before starting any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Ridgewood?
faqs.answer: Ridgewood residents commonly encounter pavement ants, carpenter ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in older Ridgewood buildings as they can damage wooden structures. Our technicians identify the specific species to apply the most effective treatment.
